name: Bedfordshire (United Kingdom)
description: A yellow field with a red diagonal stripe descending from the upper hoist, charged with three blue scallop shells.
history: Designed by Robert Bullock in 2014; registered with the Flag Institute as the flag of the historic county of Bedfordshire on 31 October 2014.

features.symbolism: from the historic arms of the de Beauchamp family, lords of Bedford
